message:
Add agent column, Codex import pipeline, and agent filtering

- Migrate sessions table with agent column (default 'claude')
- Add importCodexSessions() to scan and import Codex sessions
- Prefix Codex session IDs with 'codex:' to avoid collisions
- Skip codex_exec automated sessions during import
- Add agent field to SessionMeta type and all query SELECT lists
- Add optional agent filter to getAllSessions()
- Wire Codex import into initDb and rescanDb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
